dc_description_s: This data layer represents public land survey system (PLSS) corners for Dane County, Wisconsin in 2026. [The Dane County PLSS, is a multi-year project to re-establish and re-monument the PLSS corners in the county. These monuments make up the skeletal structure of our land ownership system. This project will benefit residents in many ways, some of which are cost savings on property surveys, more accurate mapping in the Dane County parcel data and Farm Services Agency data, and provide a much more accurate base for analyzing title issues.]
uw_supplemental_s: This is an archived copy of the data held at UW-Madison.
